# Copilot Instructions for swgoh_helper

## Code Quality

- Minimize duplicate code
- Remove dead code immediately
- Eliminate redundant operations (e.g., reading same file multiple times)
- Functions must be under 50 lines

## Code Organization

- Models go in `src/swgoh_helper/models/` directory
- Constants go in `src/swgoh_helper/constants.py`

## Preferences

- Use Pydantic over dataclasses
